title: Schwabenpatch
description:
Adds Localization for Swabian
(Schwäbisch) using sch_de.json (should be swg_de.json)
body:
This pack is supposed to provide a Swabian translation to Minecraft, using a new language file (sch_de.json should be swg_de.json) which can be enabled in the language settings once the pack is active.

# New Language Option
![Language Select](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GhoQTDl2/images/d2442e3e695ae9fb70cb40b81f365d9e0b8bbff9.png)

# Supported Mods
The following 2 mods feature some sort of Swabian translation with their own sch_de.json files:
- [TLOTD](https://modrinth.com/mod/tlotd) by [TLOTD](https://modrinth.com/organization/tlotd), Translated by [Isla_Nublar](https://modrinth.com/user/Isla_Nublar).
- [Book of Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/book-of-dragons) by [MrMagister](https://modrinth.com/user/MrMagister), Translated by [Isla_Nublar](https://modrinth.com/user/Isla_Nublar).
